title: ophrys × vicina nothosubsp. vicina
intro: Ophrys × vicina nothosubsp. vicina, also known as the bee orchid, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Ophrys apifera and Ophrys bombyliflora. The bee orchid is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing swelling and fighting off infections, as well as providing antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
